name: Pythia-12B
archDisplay: Decoder-only Transformer (GPT-NeoX architecture, RoPE, parallel attention+FF, 36 layers)
note: Flagship of the 8-model Pythia suite; 154 released checkpoints per model for interpretability/training-dynamics research

results.notes: zero-shot accuracy, LM Eval Harness, lambada_openai task, final checkpoint (step143000) — raw eval JSON acc=0.7046
zero-shot, LM Eval Harness, final checkpoint (step143000) — raw eval JSON acc=0.7601

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: exact param count 11,846,072,320 (=11.846B, rounds to 11.8 matching record), 36 layers, Apache-2.0. Original sourceUrl (arxiv abstract page) does not literally display these numbers, so I re-sourced them: fetched the official raw eval JSON from github.com/EleutherAI/pythia (evals/pythia-v1/pythia-12b/zero-shot/12b_step143000.json, the final-checkpoint zero-shot run) and confirmed lambada_openai acc=0.7046(→70.5), piqa acc=0.7601(→76.0), arc_easy acc=0.7024(→70.2) — all match the claimed scores essentially exactly. Updated each row's sourceUrl to this verifiable GitHub JSON.
